overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban commercial district. The player character walks past the MedCenter building, crosses streets with futuristic vehicles, navigates through crowded pedestrian plazas with trash piles and bus shelters, and enters a small blue kiosk shop. The scene features bright midday sun, teal-colored pedestrian zones, and dense cyberpunk-themed crowds.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with MedCenter entrance and vehicle traffic

events.description: crossing the street while futuristic vehicles pass by the MedCenter entrance
moving from street crossing into the teal-colored pedestrian plaza zone

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and crossing the street near the MedCenter garage entrance, passing parked futuristic vehicles

notable_agents.action: military-style olive green SUV parked along the curb
sleek yellow sports coupe parked near the crosswalk

entered.detail: large medical facility with red cross signage and teal architectural accents
tall orange support beams marking the entrance to the pedestrian zone
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on teal pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment begins outside the MedCenter building in a futuristic urban setting. The camera walks along the sidewalk, crosses a street with parked futuristic vehicles including a yellow sports car and military SUV, and approaches the entrance to a pedestrian plaza marked by large orange structural columns. The lighting is bright midday sun with clear visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: crowded pedestrian plaza with trash accumulation and transit infrastructure

events.description: entering area with large trash piles and significantly increased pedestrian density
navigating through dense crowd near the bus shelter and vending kiosks

agents.ego_description: walking through a densely crowded pedestrian plaza, maneuvering past numerous pedestrians and street vendors

notable_agents.action: woman in blue crop top and baseball cap walking toward the camera through the crowd
bald man with cybernetic implants and sunglasses standing near the bus shelter

entered.detail: distinctive teal-colored paved pedestrian zone covering the ground surface
large accumulation of black garbage bags and scattered debris along the walkway edge
futuristic transit shelter with teal framing and digital displays
elevated train track structure running overhead with glass enclosure

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a wide pedestrian plaza with distinctive teal pavement. The area is densely populated with pedestrians in cyberpunk attire, and features large piles of trash bags along the right side. A bus shelter with vending machines stands on the left, while an elevated monorail track is visible overhead. The camera navigates through the opposing flow of the crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza transitioning to parking area with elevated infrastructure

events.description: camera pans upward to view the MedCenter tower and overhead monorail structure
moving from crowded plaza into less dense parking lot area with parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza while looking up at the towering architecture and overhead monorail, then continuing toward the parking area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red dress walking ahead on the pathway

entered.detail: tall building with MedCenter signage visible in the distance against the sky
digital billboards mounted on the side of the elevated track structure
futuristic teal sports car parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a more open section of the plaza with fewer pedestrians, then pans upward to reveal the towering MedCenter building and elevated monorail track with advertising billboards. The scene transitions to a parking area with a parked teal sports car visible, while the monorail structure passes overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: parking area leading to small commercial kiosk shop

events.description: approaching the blue commercial kiosk with neon signage
entering the interior of the blue kiosk shop through glass doors

agents.ego_description: walking toward and entering a small blue commercial kiosk, passing through the glass doorway into the shop interior

entered.detail: small hexagonal blue shop with glass walls, purple neon trim, and cardboard boxes stacked outside
futuristic automated vending machines with digital displays
interior of the kiosk visible through glass doors, containing shelves and a checkout counter

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking through a quieter parking area toward a distinctive blue commercial kiosk with neon lighting. The camera approaches the shop, passes by vending machines and trash piles, and enters through the glass doors into the interior, where shelves and a checkout counter become visible. The lighting shifts from bright outdoor sun to mixed indoor lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright urban street through a crowded pedestrian plaza and into a small commercial interior. It begins outside the MedCenter building, moving along a sidewalk and crossing a street lined with futuristic vehicles, including a yellow sports car and a military SUV, before passing under large orange structural columns. As the camera enters a wide plaza, the environment shifts to distinctive teal pavement filled with cyberpunk pedestrians, trash piles, and a bus shelter beneath an elevated monorail track. The scene then opens into a less crowded parking area where the camera pans upward to reveal towering architecture and advertising billboards before turning toward a neon-lit blue kiosk. Finally, the camera passes by vending machines and enters through glass doors, as the lighting transitions from the bright midday sun to the mixed artificial glow of the shop's interior.
